name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_srapc_utbl_tmp_civil_master
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_srapc' AS schema_name,
  'utbl_tmp_civil_master' AS table_name,
  'MANAGED' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Immediate_Response_Time` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Immediate_Response_Time` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Permanent_Rectification_Time` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Permanent_Rectification_Time` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Maintenance_Scheduled_Interval__Aggregation_` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Maintenance_Scheduled_Interval__Aggregation_` AS TIMESTAMP) END)) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Immediate_Response_Time` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Immediate_Response_Time` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Immediate_Response_Time` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Permanent_Rectification_Time` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Permanent_Rectification_Time` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Permanent_Rectification_Time` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Maintenance_Scheduled_Interval__Aggregation_` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Maintenance_Scheduled_Interval__Aggregation_` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Maintenance_Scheduled_Interval__Aggregation_` AS TIMESTAMP) END)) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'Immediate_Response_Time|Permanent_Rectification_Time|Maintenance_Scheduled_Interval__Aggregation_' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_srapc`.`utbl_tmp_civil_master`
